title: Caterserve 10 Aluminium Foil Trays with Lids - Large Tin Foil Containers with Paper Lids for Roasting, Baking, Broiling, Cooking, Food Storage and Freezing | 9 x 9 inch Square
features: EXCELLENT HIGH QUALITY - These disposable aluminium foil trays are made from eco-friendly recyclable aluminium. The sturdy grip was designed for easy handling and to maintain its structural integrity.

SUPERIOR HEAT DISTRIBUTION - This large tin foil containers withstands temperatures of up to 500 Fahrenheit to help evenly distribute heat. Our Foil Baking trays comes with Paper lids to ensure your cooked meals does not spill and stay warm for longer.

MULTI-PURPOSE – This tin foil food container is freezer safe, making it ideal to store away your favourite food. These disposable aluminium trays are perfect for picnics, catering party portions, BBQ, takeaways and much more

CONVENIENTLY REUSABLE & RECYCLABLE - Aluminium take-out containers allows you to send guests home with leftovers without the hassle of getting your containers back! Dispose of the foil packaging when you don't feel like cleaning as they are recyclable, or easily hand wash and use them later as they can be reusable
PACKAGE CONTAINS – 10 foil trays and 10 Paper foil Lined lids 9x 9 inch Square 2 inch deep, Each tray measures 23x 23cm and 50mm in depth made from eco-friendly recyclable aluminium.
